title: tectaria irrigua
intro: Tectaria irrigua, also known as the "Hawaiian tree fern," is a species of fern native to tropical Asia and the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Tectaria irrigua include reduced inflammation and improved wound healing, as well as potential antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. Tinctures, infusions, and salves made from the plant are commonly used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
